mapper.select: SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW ORGNAMECODE , RPR_OGN_NM ORGNAME , NVL(TRIM(FIU_USER_ID), RPR_CHRG_P_ENO) MAINAUTHORUSERID , RPR_CHRG_P_NM MAINAUTHOR , RPR_RSPSB_P_NM MANAGER , RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO PHONE , DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(RPR_ORG_PST_NO, '99999')), 0, '99999', 5, RPR_ORG_PST_NO, '99999') ADDRESSZIPCODE , RPR_ORG_ADDR AS ADDRESS, --주소(자택) RPR_ORG_EMAIL EMAIL , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ) AS MAINAUTHORRANKNAME FROM NIC86B

SELECT (SELECT RPR_OGN_NM FROM NIC86B WHERE BRN_CD='122') AS ORG_NM --계좌개설 금융기관 , (SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD FROM NIC86B WHERE BRN_CD='122') AS ORG_C --개설금융기관코드, , A.ACNT_NO --계좌번호 , A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌ID , A.AC_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 , A.OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설점코드 , A.AC_OPN_BRN_NM -- 계좌개설점명 , A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 , A.MN_DL_DPRT_NM --계좌관리점명 , A.AC_TY_CD --계좌유형코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('M034',A.AC_TY_CD) AS AC_TY_NM--계좌유형 , A.CS_NM , A.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC FROM NIC71B A, NIC70B B, NIC66B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT=#{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID =#{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.CS_NM, --고객명 A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, --실명번호구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --실명번호구분코드명 A.CS_NO, A.CS_NO AS CS_NO_DEC, --실명번호 A.RNMCNO, -- 고객번호 A.NTN_CD, --국가코드 A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, --직업코드 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --계좌개설금융기관 C.ACNT_NO, C.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, C.GNL_AC_NO, --계좌번호 --GET_CODE_NAME('M034',C.AC_TY_CD) AS GOODS , --계좌유형 NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = 'S050' AND CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(C.GNL_AC_NO, -2)),'기타') AS GOODS, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.OPN_BRN_CD,'') OPN_BRN_CD_NM, --상품개설지점명 FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.MNGG_BRN_CD,'') MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM, --주거래부점명 '' AS AC_BAL, --계좌잔액 (SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.OPN_BRN_CD) AS OPN_BRN_CD_POST,--계좌개설지점우편번호 C.AC_OPN_DT, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.AC_OPN_DT,'') AS GDS_OPN_DT, --계좌개설일자 E.PRXY_NM, --대리인명 E.PRXY_RLTNS_CD, --대리인계좌주와의관계 E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, --대리인실명구분 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) as PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM, --대리인실명구분 FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', (SELECT CS_NO FROM NIC01B Z WHERE Z.RNMCNO = E.PRXY_RNMCNO),'') AS PRXY_RNMCNO, --대리인실명번호 E.PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PRXY_TEL_NO, --대리인전화번호 E.NTN_CD, --대리인국적 F.BRN_NM, --F.BRN_CD, F.TRNS_OGN_CD, --계좌개설금융기관코드 --C.AC_TY_CD, --계좌유형코드 NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = 'S050' AND CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(C.GNL_AC_NO, -2)),'99') AS AC_TY_CD, NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.OPN_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS OPN_BRN_CD, --계좌개설지점코드 NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.MNGG_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD, --계좌관리점코드 F.BRN_NM, -- 조회점명 NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = F.BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS BRN_CD, -- 조회점코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M059', NVL(TRIM(A.STR_JOB_GUBN),'91')) AS STR_JOB_GUBN, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') RP_DT, --조회일시, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-30, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:MM:SS') RP_DT_BE, (SELECT ACNT_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_NAME WHERE ACNT_NAME_TYPE_CODE = 'TYPE' AND LANG_CODE = 'KO' AND ACNT_ID = C.GNL_AC_NO) AS ACNT_GDS_NM, F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW FROM NIC01B A, NIC17B C, NIC18B E, NIC86B F WHERE C.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND C.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}

SELECT GNL_AC_NO||LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS GNL_SQ, --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001) ROWNUM AS DL_SQ, --거래순번 A.* FROM ( SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) LEADING(A) ORDERED */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM, --거래발생일시 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM, --거래종류명 GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM, --거래수단명 GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM,--거래채널명 A.CRNCY_CD, --통화구분코드 NVL(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, 0) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT, -- 외화거래금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','07','08','12','14','16','20') THEN A.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT, --입금금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09','13','15','21' ) THEN A.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT, --지급금액 A.TFND_RA, --잔액금액 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --취급금융기관명 DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM, -- 취급점명 GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM, --유가증권명 C.CHCK_STRT_NO, --시작번호 C.CHCK_END_NO, --끝번호 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) END AS CSH_BRN, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_NM, --의뢰인명 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM, --의뢰인실명구분 B.PRXY_RNMCNO, --의뢰인실명번호 B.NTN_CD, --의뢰인국적
-- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명 -- G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호 -- GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN '삼성증권' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.INSN_IDNF_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUS_INSTITUTION_CODE I WHERE I.INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KSDC' AND I.INSN_IDNF_CODE = T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(U.ACNT_NO), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_ACNT_NO_CRYP), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NM), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_SBTT_CLNT_NAME), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NO), ' ') ELSE ' ' END ELSE G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',S.RNM_CNFR_CCD) ELSE '기타' END ELSE SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
'' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD, --상대계좌주국적(데이터 없음) A.DL_TYP_CD, --거래종류코드 A.DL_WY_CD, --거래수단코드 A.DL_CHNNL_CD, --거래채널코드 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS OGN_CD, --취급금융기관코드 (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD, --취급점코드 C.CHCK_KND_CD, --유가증권코드 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW END AS CSH_ORG_CD, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) END AS CSH_BRN_CD, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, --의뢰인실명구분코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN 'GC0025' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.TRNSFRM_CD) FROM SSQ.NIC95B I WHERE I.CD = 'L189' AND I.CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE, 1, 6)), ' ') END ELSE (SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD='L188' AND CD_VL9 = G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD,--상대금융기관코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN S.RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE '99' END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE ' ' END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD, --상대계좌주실명구분코드
'A' AS GBN_CD, --정정구분코드 A.GNL_AC_NO, H.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, A.DTLS_TRDG_NAME AS A1, --적요(거래코드명) J.RPRS_ISCD AS A2, J.PRDT_NAME AS A3, A.DL_UPRC AS A4, TRUNC(A.DL_Q) AS A5, A.DL_AMT AS A6, CASE WHEN A.CHCK_AMT > 0 THEN A.CHCK_AMT END AS CHCK_AMT, --수표금액 A.ADJST_AMT, --정산금액 A.SECBAL_EVAL_AMT, --유가잔고 A.DPS_AMT, --예수금잔고 A.RCVBL_BAL_AMT, --미수금잔고 A.MLOAN_SLOAN_AMT, --융자금/대주금 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW, --취급금융기관코드 CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC75B AA, NIC66B BB WHERE AA.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = BB.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND AA.SSPS_DL_ID = BB.SSPS_DL_ID AND AA.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND AA.DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND AA.DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ AND BB.SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' AND ( BB.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' OR (AA.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND AA.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}) ) ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DOBT_DL_RPR_YN, --의심거래보고여부 (SELECT DECODE(TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME), '거래소', '코스피', TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME)) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '00828' AND T.CMN_CDVL = L.BYMK_SECT_CODE AND T.DEL_YN <> 'Y') AS BYMK_SECT_NM --거래소명 FROM SSQ.NIC61B A, SSQ.NIC99B B, SSQ.NIC63B C, SSQ.NIC01B D, SSQ.NIC04B E, SSQ.NIC86B F, SSQ.NIC62B G, SSQ.NIC17B H, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT J, SID.IDO_A_TLP_STCK_ISUS_BSC L,
SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T, SSQ.NIC17B U, SSQ.NIC01B S
WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND E.CNTC_TYP_CD(+) = '1' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = H.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = J.PRDT_ID(+) AND J.PRDT_ID = L.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND A.DL_DT = T.TRDG_DATE(+) AND A.DL_SQ = T.TRDG_NO(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = T.ACNT_ID(+)
AND T.RLTV_ACNT_ID = U.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND U.RNMCNO = S.RNMCNO(+)
AND A.RLTV_ACNT_ID NOT IN (SELECT TO_NUMBER(CNTNT) FROM SSQ.NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M077')
ORDER BY A.DL_DT DESC, LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0') DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 500

SELECT A.*, ROWNUM FROM ( SELECT AA.* FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,7,2) || ' ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LPAD(TRIM(B.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DL_DT_TM, -- 거래일시 TRIM(B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , TRIM(B.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_ID , TRIM(B.GNL_AC_NO) AS GNL_AC_NO , TRIM(B.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NO , TRIM(B.DL_SQ) AS SEQ, /* 거래일련번호 */ TRIM(B.DL_DT) AS DDATE, /* 거래일자 */ TRIM(LPAD(TRIM(B.DL_TM), 6, '0')) AS DTIME, /* 거래시간 */ TRIM(B.DL_CHNNL_CD) CHANNELCODE, /* 거래채널코드 */ GET_CODE_NAME('M044',B.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS CHANNEL , TRIM(B.DL_WY_CD) MEANCODE, /* 거래방법코드 */ GET_CODE_NAME('M046',B.DL_WY_CD) AS MEAN , TRIM(B.DL_TYP_CD) METHODCODE, /* STR거래종류코드 */ GET_CODE_NAME('M045',B.DL_TYP_CD) AS METHOD , COALESCE(TRIM(B.GDS_DIT_CD), TRIM(D.GDS_DIT_CD), '99') GOODSCODE, /* 거래상품코드 */ GET_CODE_NAME('M034', COALESCE(TRIM(B.GDS_DIT_CD), TRIM(D.GDS_DIT_CD), '99')) AS GOODS , /* 거래상품명 */ NVL(TRIM(B.CRNCY_CD), #{moneyType}) MONEYTYPECODE, /* 통화코드 */ '' MONEYTYPE , TRIM(B.DL_AMT) KRWAMOUNT, /* 거래금액 */ TRIM(B.FCRNCY_DL_AMT) FOREIGNAMOUNT, /* 외화거래금액 */ NVL(TRIM(D.USD_EXCH_AMT),0) USDAMOUNT, /* 달러환산금액 */ TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW) ORGNAMECODE, /* 기관코드 */ TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) ORGNAME, -- DECODE(NVL( (SELECT KFB_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'UNKNOWN'),'UNKNOWN','UNKNOWN',NVL(B.HANDLNG_BRN_NM,'UNKNOWN')) AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 -- NVL( (SELECT KFB_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'ZZZZZZZ') as BRANCHOFFICECODE, --지점코드 -- DECODE(NVL( (SELECT KFB_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), '999999'),'999999','999999',NVL(B.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO, '999999')) AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE --우편번호 COALESCE(B.HANDLNG_BRN_NM, (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 NVL( (SELECT SUBSTR(TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE), 0,7) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'ZZZZZZZ') as BRANCHOFFICECODE, --지점코드 NVL( (SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ), '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE --우편번호* FROM NIC66B A , NIC75B B , NIC86B C , NIC61B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND B.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) ) AA ORDER BY DL_DT_TM DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

SELECT TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW) ORGNAMECODE , TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) ORGNAME , (SELECT ACNT_NO FROM NIC17B Z WHERE Z.GNL_AC_NO=TRIM(A.GNL_AC_NO)) ACCOUNTNUMBER , '01'AS ACCOUNTROLECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M057','1') AS ACCOUNTROLE FROM NIC75B A , NIC86B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW) ORGNAMECODE , TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) ORGNAME , TRIM(D.GNL_AC_NO) ACCOUNTNUMBER , '02' AS ACCOUNTROLECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M057','2') AS ACCOUNTROLE FROM NIC75B A , NIC83B B , NIC86B C , NIC17B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD = C.TRNS_OGN_CD AND B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

SELECT A.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME, --금융기관명 A.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ORGNAMECODE, --금융기관코드* NVL( B.AC_OPN_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 NVL( (SELECT KFTC_BRHN_CODE FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD) , 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS BRANCHOFFICECODE, --지점코드 char 7 NVL( (SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ), '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE, --우편번호 B.ACNT_NO AS ACCOUNTNUMBER, --계좌번호 NVL(B.AC_OPN_DT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS REGDATE , --계좌개설일 NVL( DECODE(TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) , '04' , ( SELECT DL_P_PSPT_NO FROM NIC78B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO ) , TRIM(D.CS_NO) ) , TRIM(D.CS_NO) ) AS ACCOUNTUSER, --계좌주실명번호 D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS ACCOUNTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* CASE WHEN B.AC_OPN_PRXY_F = '1' AND (TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL OR TRIM(F.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) IS NOT NULL) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AGENTFLAG, --대리인존재여부 NVL(TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO), TRIM(F.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP)) AS AGENTUSER, --대리인실명번호 E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD AS AGENTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* GET_CODE_NAME('M038', CASE WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='S061' AND CD_VL9 = G.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) , '02') WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='S062' AND CD_VL9 = G.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) , '02') ELSE '99' END ) AS ACCOUNTOPENPURPOSE, --계좌개설목적 CASE WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='S061' AND CD_VL9 = G.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) , '02') WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='S062' AND CD_VL9 = G.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) , '02') ELSE '99' END AS ACCOUNTOPENPURPOSECODE --계좌개설목적코드* FROM NIC86B A , NIC71B B , NIC66B C , NIC70B D , NIC72B E , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS F, SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD G WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND E.PRXY_RNMCNO = ''||F.ENTY_ID(+) AND E.PRXY_CS_NO = F.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.RNMCNO = ''||G.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(A NIC70BPK) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','01') AS RELATIONROLE , '01' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 A.INDV_CORP_CCD AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 NVL( DECODE( TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) , '04', (SELECT /*+ INDEX(K NIC78BPK) */ DL_P_PSPT_NO FROM NIC78B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) , TRIM(A.CS_NO) ), TRIM(A.CS_NO) ) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM , -- 의심거래자 실명번호 TRIM(A.CS_NO) REALNUMBER, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) REALNUMBERCODE, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , '' INSURELDESC, -- 의심거래자 거래자와의 관계 '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 A.DL_P_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, NVL(A.DL_P_NTNLT_NM, get_code_name('A009', NVL(A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR'))) AS NATIONALITY, D.ACNT_NO, A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO --고객엔티티ID FROM NIC70B A , NIC71B D , NIC66B B , NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND C.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(D NIC01PK) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','03') AS RELATIONROLE , '03' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(A.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 거래대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 거래대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 거래대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(A.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' AS PARREALNUMBER, A.PRXY_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, NVL(A.PRXY_NTNLT_NM, get_code_name('A009', NVL(A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR'))) AS NATIONALITY, (SELECT ACNT_NO FROM NIC17B WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS ACNT_NO, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC98B A , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','08') AS RELATIONROLE , '08' RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 D.INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 계좌주 실명번호 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 계좌주 실명번호 TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 계좌주 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , '' AS INSURELDESC, '' AS PARREALNUMBER, D.DL_P_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(D.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, NVL(D.DL_P_NTNLT_NM, get_code_name('A009', NVL(D.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR'))) AS NATIONALITY, A.ACNT_NO, D.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC71B A , NIC72B B , NIC75B C, NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','09') AS RELATIONROLE , '09' RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(B.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' AS PARREALNUMBER, B.PRXY_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(B.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, NVL(B.PRXY_NTNLT_NM, get_code_name('A009', NVL(B.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR'))) AS NATIONALITY, A.ACNT_NO, B.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC71B A , NIC72B B , NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(A NIC17B_IX2) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','11') AS RELATIONROLE , '11' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 의심거래자 실명번호 NVL( DECODE( TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD),'04',E.PSPT_NO, TRIM(D.CS_NO) ), TRIM(A.RNMCNO) ) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM ,-- 의심거래자 실명번호 TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , '' INSURELDESC, -- 의심거래자 거래자와의 관계 '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 D.CS_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(D.NTN_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, get_code_name('A009', NVL(D.NTN_CD,'KR')) AS NATIONALITY, A.ACNT_NO, D.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D , NIC02B E WHERE A.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(E NIC17B_IX2) */ GET_CODE_NAME('M056','12') AS RELATIONROLE , '12' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(A.PRXY_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 A.PRXY_NM AS CS_NM, NVL(A.NTN_CD,'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE, get_code_name('A009', NVL(A.NTN_CD,'KR')) AS NATIONALITY, E.ACNT_NO, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC17B E , NIC18B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE E.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND E.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} ) ORDER BY 2

SELECT '05' AS SECURITIESTYPECODE, -- 수표종류코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M052', '05') AS SECURITIESTYPE , DECODE( LENGTH(TRIM(NVL('', ''))), 8, TRIM(NVL(B.NEW_CHCK_NO, ''))||'~'||SUBSTR(TRIM(NVL('', '')), 4, 4) , TRIM(NVL(B.NEW_CHCK_NO, '')) ) SECURITIESNUMBER, -- 수표시작번호,수표끝번호 X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME ,--금융기관명 X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ORGNAMECODE, --금융기관코드 A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 NVL(B2.BANK_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS ISSUEORGNAME, --발행은행명 NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='L188' AND CD_VL9 = B2.BANK_CODE) , 'ZZZZZZ') AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE, --발행은행코드 NVL(B1.BANK_BRNH_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE, --발행영업점명 B.CHCK_AMNT AS ISSUEAMOUNT, -- 수표금액 DECODE(LENGTH(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE)), '8', TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), B.TRDG_DATE) ISSUEDATE, -- 수표발행일자 '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE, -- 배서자종류코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) REALNUMBER, -- 배서자실명번호 TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 배서자실명번호 구분 FROM NIC75B A, SID.IDO_A_MBA_CHCK_INOU B, SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK_BRANCH B1, SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B2, NIC66B C, NIC70B D, NIC86B X WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.ACNT_ID AND A.DL_DT = B.TRDG_DATE AND A.DL_SQ = DECODE(B.TRDG_NO, 0, A.DL_SQ, B.TRDG_NO) AND B.BANK_CODE = B1.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND B.BANK_BNCD = B1.BANK_BNCD (+) -- 지점코드 AND B.BANK_CODE = B2.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND B.CHCK_RCPS_CHAN_SECT_CODE IN ('0', '1') UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M10%' THEN '09' --CD WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M19%' THEN '02' --약속어음 ELSE '99' --기타 END AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M10%' THEN '09' --CD WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M19%' THEN '02' --약속어음 ELSE '99' --기타 END) AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ISSUEORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , NIC70B D , NIC86B X WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M%' UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D10%' THEN '03' --국채 WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D11%' OR A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D12%' THEN '04' --공채 ELSE '99' --기타 END AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D10%' THEN '03' --국채 WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D11%' OR A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D12%' THEN '04' --공채 ELSE '99' --기타 END ) AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ISSUEORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM SSQ.NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , NIC70B D , NIC86B X WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D%' UNION ALL SELECT '99' AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', '99') AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , X.RPR_OGN_NM AS ISSUEORGNAME , X.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM SSQ.NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , NIC70B D , NIC86B X WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO NOT LIKE 'M%' AND A.GDS_NO NOT LIKE 'D%'

SELECT SQ , DECODE(PROC_FALG,'0','정상','오류') PROC_FALG_NM , PROC_FALG , DECODE(PROC_FALG,'0','해당사항 없음',PROC_CTNT) PROC_CTNT , TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC80B_LOG WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY SQ DESC

SELECT TRNSFRM_CD , MIN(TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL) TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL , MIN(CD_VL9) CD_VL9 FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = #{CD}
AND TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL LIKE '%'||#{TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL}||'%'
AND TRNSFRM_CD LIKE #{TRNSFRM_CD}||'%'
GROUP BY TRNSFRM_CD ORDER BY TRNSFRM_CD

SELECT A.DL_TYP_CD AS TRANSTYPECODE -- 거래종류코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS TRANSTYPE -- 거래종류명 , SUBSTRB(B.PRDT_NAME,1,30) AS STOCKNAME -- 매매종목명 , CASE WHEN A.DL_Q = 0 THEN 1 WHEN A.DL_Q > 9999999999 THEN 9999999999 ELSE A.DL_Q END AS QUANTITY -- 매매수량 , TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW) AS ORGNAMECODE , TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) AS ORGNAME , NVL(A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE , NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE), 0,7) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'ZZZZZZZ') AS BRANCHOFFICECODE , NVL(A.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO, '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE FROM NIC75B A, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B, NIC86B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID(+)
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B X SET KFU_RPR_DT = CASE WHEN #{KFU_RPR_STS_CD} = '10' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = X.SSPS_DL_ID AND KFU_RPR_STS_CD = '10') THEN KFU_RPR_DT ELSE SYSDATE END END , KFU_RPR_STS_CD = DECODE(RRPR_YN, 'Y', KFU_RPR_STS_CD, #{KFU_RPR_STS_CD}) , KFU_RRPR_STS_CD = DECODE(RRPR_YN, 'Y', #{KFU_RPR_STS_CD}, KFU_RRPR_STS_CD) WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC80B_HIS ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , RRPR_SQ , SQ , RRPR_YN , KFU_RPR_STS_CD , KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT , SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , SND_RCPT_FILE_NM , HNDL_DY_TM ) SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , A.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN B.RRPR_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT MAX(RRPR_SQ) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) ELSE 0 END , (SELECT NVL(MAX(SQ) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_SQ DESC, SQ DESC), 0)+1 FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) , DECODE(B.RRPR_YN, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') , #{KFU_RPR_STS_CD} , #{KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT} , CASE WHEN B.RRPR_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT MAX(SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_SQ DESC, SQ DESC) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) ELSE A.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO END , CASE WHEN B.RRPR_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT MAX(SND_RCPT_FILE_NM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_SQ DESC, SQ DESC) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) ELSE A.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM END , SYSDATE FROM NIC80B A, NIC66B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.RRPR_SQ, A.SQ) AS RNUM , A.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , A.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM , DECODE(A.RRPR_YN, 'Y', 'Y') AS RRPR_YN , TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM , GET_CODE_NAME('S060', A.KFU_RPR_STS_CD) AS KFU_RPR_STS_NM , A.KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT FROM NIC80B_HIS A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY RNUM DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(A.RRPR_YN) = 'Y' THEN (SELECT MAX(SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_YN DESC, SQ DESC) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND RRPR_YN = 'Y' AND KFU_RPR_STS_CD = '99') ELSE TRIM(C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) END AS FIUDOCNUM /* 보고번호 금융기관코드 + YYYYMM + 순번(5)*/ , TRIM(C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) ORGDOCNUM /* 작성번호 금융기관코드 + YY + 순번(4)*/ , CASE WHEN MAX(A.RRPR_YN) = 'Y' THEN TRIM(C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) END AS FORMERFIUDOCNUM /* 종전 보고문서번호 */ , '' FORMERORGDOCNUM /* 종전 작성번호 */ , MIN(B.DL_DT) STARTDATE /* 거래시작일 */ , MAX(B.DL_DT) ENDDATE /* 거래종료일*/ , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20','70') AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) INNERCOUNT /* 입금횟수*/ , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) OUTERCOUNT /* 출금횟수*/ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.DL_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20','70') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = #{moneyType} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) INNERKRWAMOUNT /* 입금원화금액*/ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.DL_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = #{moneyType} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) OUTERKRWAMOUNT /* 출금원화금액*/ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.USD_EXCH_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20','70') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) INNERUSDAMOUNT /* 입금달러화금액*/ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.USD_EXCH_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) OUTERUSDAMOUNT /* 출금달러화금액 */ , COUNT(CASE WHEN B.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20','02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','70','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') THEN 1 END) COUNT /* 거래건수 */ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.DL_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20','02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','70','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = #{moneyType} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) KRWAMOUNT /* 입출금원화금액*/ , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(T1.USD_EXCH_AMT),'0') FROM NIC75B T1 WHERE T1.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20', '02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21','70','25','26','27','28','29','30','71') AND T1.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) USDAMOUNT /* 입출금달러화금액*/ , CASE WHEN MAX(A.RRPR_YN) = 'Y' THEN '04' ELSE '01' END AS MESSAGETYPECODE /* 보고구분 */ , CASE WHEN MAX(A.RRPR_YN) = 'Y' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(SND_RCPT_FILE_NM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_YN DESC, SQ DESC), 12, 8) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND RRPR_YN = 'Y' AND KFU_RPR_STS_CD = '99') ELSE C.RPR_DT END AS DOCSENDDATE /* 보고일자 */ FROM NIC66B A , NIC75B B , NIC80B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , A.SSPS_DL_ID , A.RPR_CCD /* 혐의거래보고구분코드 */ , C.RPR_DT /* 보고일자 */ , C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO

SELECT X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래일자 , X2.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID , X2.RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 , X2.SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 , X2.REQ_DT --요청일자 --, DECODE(X2.SSPS_DL_GB, 'C', '', '생성') AS FILE_CREAT --파일생성여부 --, X2.SSPS_DL_GB --보고구분 --, X2.RPT_DOC_NO AS RPT_DOC_NO_100B --보고문서번호 --, replace(X1.ORG_FILE_NM, '/xml/rstr/','') AS ORG_FILE_NM --보고파일명 FROM NIC100B X2 WHERE X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X2.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X2.SSPS_DL_GB = 'C' ORDER BY X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, X2.SSPS_DL_ID, X2.SSPS_DL_SEQ DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , RPT_DOC_NO , RPR_OGN_NM , RPR_OGN_CD , SSPS_DL_SEQ , SSPS_INFO_NM , SSPS_INFO_CD , SSPS_DL_DOC_NO , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REQ_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_DT , REQ_DEP , REQ_DEP_TEL_NO , REQ_CONTENT FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = 'C' AND RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.RRPR_SQ, A.SQ) AS RNUM , A.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , A.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM , DECODE(A.RRPR_YN, 'Y', 'Y') AS RRPR_YN , TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM , GET_CODE_NAME('S060', A.KFU_RPR_STS_CD) AS KFU_RPR_STS_NM , A.KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT FROM NIC80B_HIS A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.RRPR_SQ = #{RRPR_SQ} ORDER BY A.RRPR_SQ DESC, A.SQ DESC

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M061','52' ) AS RELATION, --USER관계 '52' AS RELATIONCODE, --거래자관계코드* D.CS_NO AS PRINCIPALUSER, --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 MAX(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRINCIPALUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* E.PRXY_CS_NO AS PARTICIPANTUSER, --관계인 MAX(DECODE(E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, '', '99', E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS PARTICIPANTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* MAX(GET_CODE_NAME('M042',DECODE(E.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD, '', '9', E.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) ) ) AS REMARK --관계명 FROM NIC66B C , NIC70B D , NIC71B B , NIC72B E WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY D.CS_NO, E.PRXY_CS_NO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X1.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO --문서번호 , X1.SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 , X1.RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 , X1.SSPS_INFO_CD --정보분류코드 , X1.SSPS_INFO_NM --정보분류명 , X1.RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 , X1.REQ_DT --요청일자 , X1.REQ_DEP --요청부서 , X1.REQ_DEP_TEL_NO --요청부서전화번호 , (SELECT MAX(SND_RCPT_FILE_NM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY SQ DESC) FROM NIC80B_ADD WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = X1.SSPS_DL_ID AND SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = X1.RPT_DOC_NO AND RRPR_SQ = X1.SSPS_DL_SEQ) AS TRSMT_ST_NM , X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래일 , X1.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID , X4.DL_P_NM , X1.RES_DT --제공일자 , X2.FILE_SEQ --파일일련번호 , X2.FILE_POS --파일PATH , X2.USER_FILE_NM --파일논리이름 , X2.PHSC_FILE_NM --파일물리이름 , X1.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD --보고진행구분코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('S063', X1.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD) AS SSPS_PRGRS_CCD_NM FROM NIC100B X1, NIC101B X2, NIC66B X3, NIC70B X4 WHERE X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND X1.SSPS_DL_ID = X2.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = X3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X1.SSPS_DL_ID = X3.SSPS_DL_ID AND X3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = X4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X3.DL_P_RNMCNO = X4.DL_P_RNMCNO AND X1.SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND X2.FILE_SEQ(+) = '100' --추가자료요청 보고파일 일련번호는 '100'이다. AND X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD(+) = 'IFS' --추가자료요청 구분값 ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.REQ_DT >= #{startDate} /* 요청일자 */
AND A.REQ_DT <= #{endDate} /* 요청일자 */
AND A.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD = #{SSPS_PRGRS_CCD}
AND A.RPT_DOC_NO LIKE '%'|| UPPER( #{RPT_DOC_NO}) || '%' /* 보고문서번호 */
AND A.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO LIKE '%'|| UPPER( #{SSPS_DL_DOC_NO}) || '%' /* 문서번호 */
ORDER BY A.REQ_DT DESC

SELECT FILE_SEQ , FILE_POS , USER_FILE_NM , PHSC_FILE_NM , FILE_SIZE FROM NIC101B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND FILE_SEQ >= '101' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'IFS'

SELECT X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래일 , X1.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID , X1.RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 , X1.RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 , X1.RPR_OGN_CD --보고기관코드 , X1.SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 , X1.SSPS_INFO_NM --분류명 , X1.SSPS_INFO_CD --분류코드 , X1.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO --문서번호 , X1.REQ_DT --요청일자 , X1.REQ_DEP --요청부서 , X1.REQ_DEP_TEL_NO --요청부서전화번호 , X1.REQ_CONTENT --요청내용 , X1.RES_DT --제공일자 , X1.RES_USER_NM --제공자명 , X1.RES_USER_ID --제공자ID , X1.RES_TEL_NO --제공자전화번호 , X1.RES_CONTENT --제공내용 FROM NIC100B X1 WHERE X1.SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND X1.RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND X1.SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.RRPR_SQ, A.SQ) AS RNUM , A.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , A.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM , TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM , GET_CODE_NAME('S063', A.KFU_RPR_STS_CD) AS KFU_RPR_STS_NM , A.KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT FROM NIC80B_ADD A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} ORDER BY RNUM DESC

SELECT SSPS_DL_DOC_NO AS FIUDOCNUM --문서번호 , RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME --보고기관명 , RPR_OGN_CD AS ORGNAMECODE --보고기관코드 , SSPS_DL_SEQ AS REREPSEQUENCE --요청순번 , GET_CODE_NAME('F010', SSPS_INFO_CD) AS REREP --분류명(정보분류명) , SSPS_INFO_CD AS REREPCODE --분류코드(정보분류코드) , RPT_DOC_NO AS ORGDOCNUM --보고문서번호 , RES_DT AS SUPPLYDATE --제공일자 , RES_CONTENT AS SUPPLYCONTENT --제공내용 , RES_USER_NM AS SUPPLYNAME --제공자명 , RES_USER_ID AS USERID --제공자ID , RES_TEL_NO AS SUPPLYPHONE --제공자전화번호 , SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , SSPS_PRGRS_CCD /* 보고진행구분코드(저장/파일생성:C, 전문발송:F, 결과:성공:S/실패:E) */ FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = #{SSPS_DL_GB} AND RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}

SELECT FILE_POS AS FILE_PATH, USER_FILE_NM AS FILE_NM, USER_FILE_NM AS USER_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM AS PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SEQ FROM NIC101B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'IFS' AND FILE_SEQ > '0'

SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BOARD_ID, SSPS_DL_ID AS BOARD_SEQ, FILE_SEQ, FILE_POS, USER_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_COUNT, REG_ID, GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM, REG_DT FROM NIC101B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{BOARD_ID} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{BOARD_SEQ} AND FILE_SEQ = #{FILE_SEQ}

--20210525 USER 중복현상 수정 SELECT MIN(A.RELATIONROLECODE) AS RELATIONROLECODE, A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /* LEADING(B) USE_NL(B A) USE_NL(B C)*/ '01' AS RELATIONROLECODE, C.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC70B A , NIC66B B , NIC71B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID UNION SELECT /* LEADING(C) USE_NL(C A) USE_NL(A D)*/ '03' AS RELATIONROLECODE, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC98B A , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT /* LEADING(C) USE_NL(C A) USE_NL(A B) USE_NL(B D) */ '09' RELATIONROLECODE, B.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC71B A , NIC72B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND B.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO(+) AND TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.PRXY_RNMCNO NOT IN ( SELECT /* LEADING(B) USE_NL(B A) USE_NL(B C)*/ C.RNMCNO FROM NIC70B A , NIC66B B , NIC71B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID ) AND ROWNUM = 1 UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(A NIC17B_IX2) USE_NL(C B) USE_NL(B A) USE_NL(A D) USE_NL(D E) */ '11' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 D.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D , NIC02B E WHERE A.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) INDEX(E NIC17B_IX2) USE_NL(C B) USE_NL(B E) USE_NL(E A) USE_NL(A D)*/ '12' AS RELATIONROLECODE, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC17B E , NIC18B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE E.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND E.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} )A GROUP BY A.RNMCNO
mapper.update: DELETE FROM NIC86B

INSERT INTO NIC86B (TRNS_OGN_CD ,BRN_CD ,BRN_NM ,RPR_OGN_NM ,RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO ,RPR_ORG_PST_NO ,SEQ ,RPR_ORG_ADDR ,RPR_ORG_EMAIL ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW ) VALUES (#{TRNS_OGN_CD} ,#{BRN_CD} ,#{BRN_NM} ,#{RPR_OGN_NM} ,#{RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO} ,#{RPR_RSPSB_P_NM} ,#{RPR_CHRG_P_ENO} ,#{RPR_CHRG_P_NM} ,#{RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO} ,#{RPR_ORG_PST_NO} ,NVL(#{SEQ}, '1') ,#{RPR_ORG_ADDR} ,#{RPR_ORG_EMAIL} ,SYSDATE ,#{USER_ID} ,#{TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS T_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS C_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(KFU_RPR_STS_CD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD) IN ('9','99','98','97','24','34','44','54') AND OK_CCD = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS F_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN RNM_PR_DL_SQ = 1 AND KFU_RPR_STS_CD IN ('34', '54') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS R_CNT --대표문서 오류건 FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}

SELECT MAX(DOC_NO) AS DOC_NO FROM ( SELECT NVL(MAX(DOC_SQ), 0) + 1 AS DOC_NO FROM NIC66B WHERE DOC_NO_YR = #{DOC_NO_YR} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') UNION ALL SELECT NVL(MAX(DOC_NO), 0) + 1 AS DOC_NO FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE DOC_NO_YR = #{DOC_NO_YR} AND SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' )
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NIC80B_HIS ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , RRPR_SQ , SQ , RRPR_YN , KFU_RPR_STS_CD , KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT , SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , SND_RCPT_FILE_NM , HNDL_DY_TM , DOC_NO_YR , DOC_NO ) SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , A.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN A.RRPR_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT MAX(RRPR_SQ) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) ELSE 0 END , (SELECT NVL(MAX(SQ) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_SQ DESC, SQ DESC), 0)+1 FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID) , DECODE(A.RRPR_YN, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') , #{KFU_RPR_STS_CD} , #{KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT} , #{SND_RCPT_DOC_NO} , #{SND_RCPT_FILE_NM} , SYSDATE , #{DOC_NO_YR} , #{DOC_NO} FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

UPDATE NIC80B_HIS SET KFU_RPR_STS_CD = #{RPR_PRGRS_CCD} , KFU_RPR_RSLT_CTNT = #{ERROR_MSG} WHERE (SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, RRPR_SQ, SQ) = (SELECT MAX(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) , MAX(SSPS_DL_ID) , MAX(RRPR_SQ) , MAX(SQ) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_SQ DESC, SQ DESC) FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} )

SELECT MAX(SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_YN DESC, SQ DESC) AS SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , MAX(SND_RCPT_FILE_NM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RRPR_YN DESC, SQ DESC) AS SND_RCPT_FILE_NM FROM NIC80B_HIS WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND RRPR_YN = 'Y' AND KFU_RPR_STS_CD = '99'
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ), 0) + 1 AS DOC_NO FROM NIC66B WHERE DOC_NO_YR = #{DOC_NO_YR} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC')
